creator: uzsolt@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Michael Schout from comment #12)
"I also updated the SSH option description to match the one from upstream (it is only used to enable SFTP support)."
If this option enables the SFTP support, maybe want rename the option SSH to SFTP? I think it would be more logic and the SSH option is a base option (https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/tree/Mk/bsd.options.desc.mk#n478).
